top_signals.title: Stocks and Bonds Rally as Oil Falls on Iran Deal: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A global relief rally drove stocks and bonds higher while oil tumbled to a three-month low after the US and Iran agreed to end their war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Slumps as US-Iran Reach Initial Peace Deal to Reopen Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Oil prices slipped to a three-month low on Monday after U.S. President Donald Trump and Iran's deputy foreign minister said they had reached an initial deal to end the war and to resume traffic through the Strait of Hormuz.Brent crude futures LCOc1 fell $3.65…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ethereum can quantum-proof accounts for just 7 cents, says Ethereum's Kohaku lead
top_signals.summary: The SPHINCS- proposal aims to reduce the cost of post-quantum signature verification on Ethereum while the network works toward a longer-term solution.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US, Iran reach preliminary agreement to end war, signing set for Friday - Reuters
top_signals.summary: US, Iran reach preliminary agreement to end war, signing set for Friday  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: StanChart looks for 3 signs of BTC bottom, including Strategy’s Monday news
top_signals.summary: Standard Chartered’s Geoff Kendrick tells clients “winter is over” as the analyst said crypto prices have likely seen the low for the cycle, ahead of Strategy’s Bitcoin purchase update.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: India, Indonesia Markets Enjoy Relief Rallies After Radical Interventions
top_signals.summary: It was arguably about buying time until a peace deal emerged. In the end they didn’t have to wait too long.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hynix Billionaire Chey, Ex-Wife Fail to Solve Divorce Dispute
top_signals.summary: Billionaire Chey Tae-won of SK Hynix Inc. and his ex-wife Roh Soh-yeong failed to reach an agreement through court mediation, setting the stage for the resumption of their long-running divorce settlement battle.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Venice and Morpheus tokens climb as US ban on Anthropic’s Fable 5 fuels ‘permissionless AI’ pitch
top_signals.summary: Venice founder Erik Voorhees and the official Morpheus account seized on the shutdown, casting it as proof of "permissionless" AI's use case.
